criteria.name: User Ratings
criteria.description: Average rating given by users on app stores.

criteria.name: Downloads
criteria.description: Total number of downloads on app stores.
criteria.sources: App Store, Google Play Store, Sensor Tower

criteria.name: AI Features
criteria.description: Number and sophistication of AI-powered features.
criteria.sources: App descriptions, tech reviews, official websites

criteria.name: User Interface
criteria.description: Ease of use and design quality of the app.
criteria.sources: User reviews, tech blogs, expert opinions

criteria.name: Update Frequency
criteria.description: Frequency of app updates and improvements.
criteria.sources: App Store, Google Play Store, official blogs

criteria.name: Community and Support
criteria.description: Availability of user community and support services.
criteria.sources: Official forums, social media, customer support reviews

criteria.name: Performance
criteria.description: App speed, stability, and resource consumption.
criteria.sources: User reviews, performance benchmarks, tech reviews

criteria.name: Innovation
criteria.description: Unique and innovative features compared to competitors.
criteria.sources: Tech blogs, app descriptions, expert analyses
